title: Compare two routines
subtitle: Explain which routine works better.
overview: A2 Core builds practical control: daily tasks, simple stories, short writing, listening repair, and clearer spoken output.

sections.title: A2 core focus
rows: My new routine is simpler than my old routine.
我的新日常比旧日常更简单。
It works better because I can do it every day.
它效果更好，因为我每天都能做到。
My new routine works better because it is simpler.
我的新日常更有效，因为它更简单。

items.en: My new routine is simpler than my old routine.
items.zh: 我的新日常比旧日常更简单。

items.en: It works better because I can do it every day.
items.zh: 它效果更好，因为我每天都能做到。

items.en: My new routine works better because it is simpler.
items.zh: 我的新日常更有效，因为它更简单。

items.en: This is practical A2 English I can use in real life.
items.zh: 这是我能在真实生活中使用的实用 A2 英语。

items.en: I will change the details and say it about myself.
items.zh: 我会改变细节，说成关于我自己的内容。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: My new routine works better because it is simpler.
lines.zh: 我的新日常更有效，因为它更简单。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you give one more useful detail?
lines.zh: 你能再给一个有用的细节吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: It works better because I can do it every day.
lines.zh: 它效果更好，因为我每天都能做到。

items.en: My new routine is simpler than my old routine.
items.zh: 我的新日常比旧日常更简单。

items.en: It works better because I can do it every day.
items.zh: 它效果更好，因为我每天都能做到。

items.en: Make a new version with your own place, time, or reason.
items.zh: 用你自己的地点、时间或原因造一个新版本。

items.en: Read it aloud until it sounds calm and natural.
items.zh: 大声朗读，直到听起来平稳自然。
